ZoneTargets.description: One irrigation zone's runtime-adjustable targets. Mirrors the controller's per-zone config (controller spec §4, §6) so a resolved profile maps directly onto it. Zone *topology* (adding/removing zones) is a controller config + restart change and is not in this write path (platform data model §3).

moisture_low_threshold.description: Irrigation triggers below this soil moisture (VWC, 0–1). Must be below moisture_high_threshold.

moisture_high_threshold.description: Irrigation stops above this soil moisture (VWC, 0–1). Must be above moisture_low_threshold.

drain_period_secs.description: Minimum gap between irrigation cycles, to prevent root saturation (seconds).

Setpoints.description: A greenhouse's target bundle: the global climate setpoints plus per-zone irrigation targets. Deliberately mirrors the controller's runtime-adjustable config (controller spec §4) so resolving a crop profile (platform §5) is a mapping, not a translation. Numeric targets only — never a crop. Temperature is a day/night pair resolved against the day window.

day_start.description: Start of the day window, local time-of-day HH:MM (24h).

day_end.description: End of the day window, local time-of-day HH:MM (24h). Must be after day_start (enforced server-side; a violation is rejected with 422).

humidity_low_pct.description: Fog-on threshold; relative humidity below this turns misters on (%RH). Must be below humidity_high_pct.

humidity_high_pct.description: Fog-off threshold; relative humidity above this turns misters off (%RH). Must be above humidity_low_pct.

co2_target_ppm.description: CO₂ enrichment target; injector opens below this, closes when reached (ppm).

co2_vent_interlock_threshold_pct.description: Vent position above which the CO₂ injector is hard-interlocked off, to avoid enriching while venting (% open).

vpd_target_kpa.description: Vapor-pressure-deficit target jointly served by the temperature and humidity loops (kPa).

dli_target_mol.description: Daily Light Integral target driving supplemental lighting (mol·m⁻²·day⁻¹).

zones.description: Per-zone irrigation targets, one entry per configured zone.

SetpointsPatch.description: Partial (merge) update of a Setpoints bundle — any subset of the same fields, same bounds. Absent fields are unchanged; a present `zones` array replaces the zone target set. Cross-field invariants the schema cannot express (humidity_low_pct < humidity_high_pct, moisture_low_threshold < moisture_high_threshold) are enforced server-side and surface as 422.
